footer.tagline: Vagabond - The app that gamifies exploring France.

home.heroSubtitle: Scratch the map, take on challenges, collect badges. Every trip becomes an adventure to complete.
home.heroMention: Free · No ads · Made in France 🇫🇷
home.deeplinkQrAlt: QR code to download the Vagabond app
home.howItWorksTitle: What if every trip became a game?
home.step1Desc: Open the app, discover hidden gems around you. Over 140,000 points of interest await you across France.
home.step2Desc: Validate your visits, take on challenges, unlock badges. Your map of France reveals itself with each adventure.
home.step3Desc: Your travel journal fills up automatically. Relive every memory, share your achievements.
home.mapTitle: Adventures await you all across France
home.mapDesc: Brittany, Provence, Alsace, Occitania... Every region hides hundreds of places to discover. It's up to you to find them.
home.b2bTitle: Do you manage a tourist destination?
home.b2bDesc: Vagabond Pro turns your territory into a playground for thousands of visitors.
home.b2bFeatures: Analytics dashboard · Custom challenges · POI promotion
home.faq1A: Yes, Vagabond is 100% free with no ads. Download the app, create your account, and start exploring France immediately.
home.faq2Q: What types of places can I find on Vagabond?
home.faq2A: Castles, museums, natural parks, historical monuments, remarkable sites, unusual places... Over 140,000 points of interest across all categories.
home.faq3Q: How does the scratch map work?
home.faq3A: Every municipality, department, and region of France is shown on your personal map. Validate your visits to progressively reveal the map.
home.faq4A: The map and previously loaded places remain accessible offline. A connection is needed to validate visits and sync your progress.
home.faq5Q: In which regions of France is the app available?
home.faq5A: Vagabond covers all of metropolitan France: 13 regions, 96 departments, and over 36,000 municipalities.
home.faq6A: Each place is carefully selected and verified by our team to ensure quality, relevance, and diversity across the entire French territory.
home.faq7Q: Can I share my adventures with friends?
home.faq7A: Yes! Share your progress, compare scratch maps, and challenge friends on the leaderboards.
home.faq8Q: Is Vagabond available outside of France?
home.faq8A: Currently, Vagabond focuses on metropolitan France. Expansion to other European countries is planned in upcoming updates.
home.ctaQrLabel: Or scan the QR code with your phone 👇

explorer.hubDescription: Vagabond lists over 140,000 points of interest across all regions of metropolitan France: castles, museums, parks, natural sites, historical monuments, and unusual places. Download the app to validate your visits and collect badges.
explorer.downloadCta: Download Vagabond and explore this region

pro.heroTitle: Turn your destination into a playground
pro.heroSubtitle: Vagabond Pro gives tourism offices and local authorities the tools to engage visitors, showcase local heritage, and measure real impact.
pro.problemText: Your visitors rush through. They only discover a fraction of your territory and you have no usable data on their journeys.
pro.agitationText: Meanwhile, gamified destinations see visit times increase, return visits multiply, and social media engagement explode.
pro.solutionText: Vagabond Pro: the SaaS dashboard that turns your destination into a game and gives you the data to optimize your tourism offering.
pro.feat1Desc: Visualize visitor journeys, most visited POIs, visit durations, and geographic origin.
pro.feat2Desc: Your priority points of interest are pushed higher in user suggestions.
pro.feat3Desc: Create themed trails (heritage, nature, gastronomy) with your own challenges and rewards.
pro.feat4Desc: Compatible with your existing tools. Deployment in days, not months.
pro.referencesText: We understand the constraints of public authorities: tight budgets, long decision processes, need for measurable results. Vagabond Pro is built for that.
pro.pricingText: Annual subscription per territory. Custom pricing based on destination size and features needed.
pro.faq1A: Standard deployment takes 2 to 4 weeks, including territory setup, POI import, and team training.
pro.faq2A: Yes, fully. Data is hosted in France, anonymized by default, and compliant with GDPR requirements.
pro.faq3Q: Can we integrate our own POIs and content?
pro.faq3A: Absolutely. You can import your own points of interest, create themed trails, and customize challenges.
pro.faq4Q: What types of organizations use Vagabond Pro?
pro.faq4A: Tourism offices, municipal communities, departments, regions, and natural parks use Vagabond Pro.
pro.faq5Q: Is there a minimum commitment period?
pro.faq5A: The subscription is annual with cancellation option. We also offer a free trial period.
pro.faq6A: A 30-minute video call where we present the dashboard, features, and answer your questions.
pro.contactSubtitle: Email us or book a demo directly.
pro.calendlySubtitle: Pick a time that works for you
pro.compareSubtitle: Few solutions offer what we do. Vagabond Pro stands out with measurable visitor engagement: on-site visit stats and visitor photos.
pro.compareFaq1Q: Is there a direct competitor to Vagabond Pro?
pro.compareFaq1A: No platform currently combines a gamified consumer mobile app, real visit statistics, visitor photos, and a territory dashboard. That is our main differentiator.
pro.compareFaq2Q: How is Vagabond Pro different from Tourinsoft or Apidae?
pro.compareFaq2A: Tourinsoft and Apidae excel at managing and distributing tourism data. Vagabond Pro adds an engagement layer: gamification, visit stats, and visitor photos — metrics CMS platforms do not collect.
pro.compareFaq3Q: Does Vagabond Pro replace Wivisites, Cirkwi, or Totemus?
pro.compareFaq3A: Not necessarily. Those solutions focus on heritage mediation or local discovery. Vagabond Pro targets measurable visitor engagement across your territory via a gamified mobile app.
pro.compareFaq4Q: Can we use Vagabond Pro with our existing data?
pro.compareFaq4A: Yes. Vagabond Pro integrates with your sources (Apidae, Tourinsoft, CSV imports…) to enrich your POIs while adding analytics, gamification, and on-site traffic data.
pro.compareFaq5A: Validations per POI, traffic by period, visitor geographic origin, progress on routes and challenges, and access to visitor-shared photos (GDPR compliant).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Vagabond, the gamified tourism app.
faq.ctaSubheading: Download Vagabond for free and start your adventure.
faq.app1A: Yes, Vagabond is 100% free with no ads. No in-app purchases are required to enjoy all features.
faq.app2Q: What devices can I use Vagabond on?
faq.app2A: Vagabond is available on iPhone (iOS 16+) and Android (8.0+). Download the app from the App Store or Google Play.
faq.app3A: The map and previously loaded places remain accessible offline. An internet connection is needed to validate visits and sync your progress.
faq.app4A: Vagabond is optimized to minimize battery usage. Location services are only active when you validate a visit, not continuously.
faq.app5Q: Is the app available in English?
faq.app5A: Yes, Vagabond is available in French and English. More languages will be added soon.
faq.app6Q: How do I update the app?
faq.app6A: Updates are automatic if you have this option enabled. Otherwise, visit the App Store or Google Play to update manually.
faq.app7A: Currently, Vagabond covers metropolitan France. Expansion to other European countries is planned.
faq.app8Q: How can I report a bug or suggest an improvement?
faq.app8A: Contact us directly at contact@vagabond.gg. We read and respond to every message.
faq.gameplay1Q: How does the scratch map work?
faq.gameplay1A: Every city, department, and region in France is represented on your personal map. Validate your visits to progressively reveal the map and track your exploration.
faq.gameplay2Q: How do I validate a visit?
faq.gameplay2A: Go near a listed place, open the app, and tap Validate. Geolocation confirms your presence and the place is added to your collection.
faq.gameplay3A: You must be within 200 meters of the place to validate your visit. This ensures you are actually on site.
faq.gameplay4A: Badges reward your achievements: number of visits, regions explored, categories of places discovered. Collect them all to become a true Vagabond!
faq.gameplay5Q: Can I see my friends' progress?
faq.gameplay5A: Yes! The leaderboard lets you compare your progress with friends and the community. Challenge them and climb the rankings.
faq.gameplay6A: Every validated visit automatically creates an entry in your travel journal with the date, place, and your photos. Relive your adventures anytime.
faq.account1Q: Do I need an account to use Vagabond?
faq.account1A: An account is required to save your progress and access all features. Registration is quick and free.
faq.account2Q: Can I use Vagabond on multiple devices?
faq.account2A: Yes, sign in with the same account on your different devices. Your progress syncs automatically.
faq.account3Q: How do I delete my account?
faq.account3A: You can delete your account in the app settings. All your data will be permanently erased.
faq.account4A: Yes, your data is protected in compliance with GDPR. We never sell your personal data. See our privacy policy for details.
faq.account5A: Yes, you can change your username at any time in your profile settings.
faq.data1A: Over 140,000 places are listed on Vagabond, spread across all regions of metropolitan France.
faq.data2Q: What types of places can I find?
faq.data2A: Castles, museums, natural parks, historical monuments, churches, remarkable sites, unusual places, and much more.
faq.data3Q: In which regions is the app available?
faq.data3A: Vagabond covers all of metropolitan France: 13 regions, 96 departments, and over 36,000 cities.
faq.data4A: Yes, our team continuously enriches the database with new places to offer ever more discoveries.
faq.pro1A: Vagabond Pro is our solution for tourism offices and local authorities. It enables custom trails, visitor engagement tracking, and territory promotion.
faq.pro2Q: How much does Vagabond Pro cost?
faq.pro2A: Pricing depends on your territory size and desired features. Contact us for a personalized quote.
faq.pro3Q: How do I get started with Vagabond Pro?
faq.pro3A: Request a free demo via our dedicated page. Our team will guide you through the setup.
faq.pro4A: Yes, Vagabond Pro is fully GDPR compliant. All data is hosted in Europe and processed according to the strictest standards.
faq.compareSubtitle: Compare Vagabond to B2C market apps on key criteria for gamified tourism in France.
faq.compareFaq1Q: How is Vagabond different from Geocaching?
faq.compareFaq1A: Geocaching is a community-driven treasure hunt around hidden caches. Vagabond focuses on French tourism: scratch map, 140,000+ curated places, badges, and an automatic travel journal.
faq.compareFaq2Q: Vagabond vs Polarsteps, Been, or Visited: which app should I choose?
faq.compareFaq2A: Polarsteps, Been, and Visited are great for tracking countries or cities visited worldwide. Vagabond goes further in France: on-site GPS validation, local gamification, and curated tourist POIs.
faq.compareFaq3Q: Why use Vagabond instead of Google Maps or Tripadvisor?
faq.compareFaq3A: Google Maps and Tripadvisor are excellent for navigation and reviews. Vagabond adds a playful layer: scratch map, challenges, explorer rankings, and progress across all of France.
faq.compareFaq4A: Pokémon Go gamifies movement with virtual creatures. Vagabond gamifies discovering real heritage and places in France, with a scratch map and a tourism-focused travel journal.
faq.compareFaq5Q: How is Vagabond different from Wivisites?
faq.compareFaq5A: Wivisites offers themed routes in specific destinations. Vagabond covers all of metropolitan France with a scratch map, 140,000+ POIs, badges, and rankings — a national experience rather than a local territory app.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question? A partnership? Write to us.
contact.formDescription: Fill in the form below and we will get back to you quickly.
contact.formEmailDescription: We will use this address to reply. We do not share your email.

legal.mentionsMetaDescription: Legal information about the publisher of vagabond.gg, hosting, and intellectual property.
legal.confMetaDescription: How Vagabond collects, uses, and protects your personal data on the website and mobile app.
legal.cguMetaDescription: Terms of use for the vagabond.gg website and the Vagabond mobile application.
legal.mentionsEditorBody:
The website www.vagabond.gg is published by Vagabond SAS, a simplified joint-stock company.
Registered office: Lille, France
Email: contact@vagabond.gg
Publication director: Cyril Bauduin, President
legal.mentionsHostingBody:
The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.
Website: vercel.com
legal.mentionsIpBody:
All content on this website (text, images, logos, illustrations, videos, trademarks) is the exclusive property of Vagabond SAS or its partners, unless otherwise stated.
Any reproduction, representation, modification, or exploitation, in whole or in part, without prior written consent is prohibited.
legal.mentionsLiabilityBody:
Vagabond strives to ensure the accuracy of information published on the website. However, Vagabond cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
Users acknowledge that they use this information at their own risk.
legal.mentionsContactBody: For any questions about the website or its content: contact@vagabond.gg
legal.confIntroBody:
Vagabond SAS ("Vagabond", "we") is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website www.vagabond.gg and its Vagabond mobile application.
This policy describes the data we collect, processing purposes, your rights, and how to exercise them.
legal.confRightsBody:
Under the GDPR, you have the rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection.
To exercise them: contact@vagabond.gg. We will respond within one month.
You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
legal.confCookiesBody:
The website does not use advertising cookies or audience measurement requiring consent under ePrivacy rules.
Traffic statistics are processed via Vercel Analytics (aggregated, privacy-friendly data).
The HubSpot embed on the Pro page may set HubSpot cookies when you interact with the meeting booking widget.
legal.confSecurityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, or disclosure.
legal.confChangesBody: We may update this policy. The last updated date appears at the top of the page. In case of material changes, we will inform you by appropriate means.
legal.cguIntroBody:
These Terms of Service govern access to and use of the website www.vagabond.gg and the Vagabond mobile application, published by Vagabond SAS.
By accessing the website or app, you unreservedly accept these Terms.
legal.cguScopeBody:
Vagabond is a gamified tourism app for discovering France, validating visited places, collecting badges, and tracking progress on an interactive map.
The website presents the service, offers editorial content, and allows tourism professionals to discover the Vagabond Pro offer.
legal.cguAccountBody:
Some app features require creating an account. You agree to provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential.
You are responsible for all activity on your account. In case of unauthorised use, contact us immediately at contact@vagabond.gg.
legal.cguProBody:
The B2B Vagabond Pro offer (destinations, tourism offices, local stakeholders) is subject to specific commercial terms communicated upon subscription.
Demo requests via the website are non-binding and do not constitute a contract.
legal.cguUserContentBody:
Photos and content you publish remain your property. You grant Vagabond a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence to host, display, and distribute this content as part of the service (public profile, community features).
You can switch your profile to private mode to limit the visibility of your visits.
legal.cguIpBody:
Vagabond trademarks, logos, interfaces, texts, maps, POI databases, and graphic elements are protected by intellectual property law.
Any unauthorised reproduction or exploitation is prohibited.
legal.cguLiabilityBody:
Vagabond strives to keep place information up to date but does not guarantee the accuracy or permanent availability of referenced points of interest.
The service is provided "as is". Vagabond shall not be liable for indirect damages, service interruptions, or decisions made based on app information.
Users remain solely responsible for their safety and compliance with local regulations when travelling.
legal.cguTerminationBody:
Vagabond reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation of these Terms, without prejudice to legal remedies.
You may delete your account at any time from the app or by contacting us.
legal.cguLawBody: These Terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, and failing amicable resolution, the competent courts shall be those of the registered office of Vagabond SAS, subject to mandatory consumer protection provisions.
legal.cguChangesBody: Vagabond may modify these Terms at any time. Users will be informed of any material changes via the app, website, or email. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
legal.cguContactBody: For any questions about these Terms: contact@vagabond.gg
